channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: No MOT Abandoned eyesore, 17th May
item.description:
This car has been parked here since last year and has not MOT. It is an eyesore. It has damage on it and doesn’t look like it’s in a drivable state. Its been taking up unnecessary space

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two flyposters are on the pelican crossing guard railings on Anerley Hill 2m from the jct with Crystal Palace Station Road., 17th May
item.description:
Two flyposters are on the pelican crossing guard railings on Anerley Hill 2m from the jct with Crystal Palace Station Road. Seen from moving vehicle 16/5/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extra blue bin at 131 Kirkwood, 17th May
item.description:
I have moved into a new house and have two large blue bins - please can you take one? I only need one.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkwood Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting waste not emptied, 17th May
item.description:
This bin is routinely ignored during every weekly cleanse. Residents assume it is a food/garden waste bin. And maybe it is not. But it attracts rats and vermin. Can it please be emptied or just totally remove the entire bin? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fulthorp Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fridge, most likely abandoned by 4 Brinkworth Way, 17th May
item.description:
Abandoned fridge, most likely abandoned by 4 Brinkworth Way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mallard Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Masses of potholes, 17th May
item.description:
There are masses of potholes and very uneven road surface due to numerous today works in recent months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and double yellow blips, 17th May
item.description:
Blocking emergency access and driveway double yellow line with blips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car illegally parking… again!, 17th May
item.description:
The vehicle GD24BSX parks on the Village Green daily - it’s a shared communal space. Not a car park! The vehicle belongs to 296 Hurst Road as they often have several vehicles and vans all parked on the grass ruining the communal green I’d like to remind the council the tenancy of a COUNCIL HOUSE permits 1 vehicle per driveway, not 7-11 cars, vans and motorbikes!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 397, Hurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken pavement on Rotherhithe street., 17th May
item.description:
The paving blocks are always sinking/falling into a void below the pavement. It has been a recurring problem for a few years. It seems like there is a bigger issue going on below the pavement around the drain cover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 366-376, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes Parked dangerously, 17th May
item.description:
Lime hire bikes Parked dangerously and blocking of the walk way for pedestrians on Swiss court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sort this out now! This is a home not a dumping ground, 17th May
item.description:
Sort this out… tens and tens of bikes ruining the road. Your business does not work take it elsewhere you littering and road blocking gits

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Charlotte Road, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Finsbury Park Avenue, Harringay, Greater London

item.title: Playground in need of maintenance, 17th May
item.description:
The playground needs maintenance. Sport's area needs cleaning from litter and foliage. Play area needs resurfacing and broken equipment needs fixing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding needed along bottom of the wall on Sandy Hill Road, 17th May
item.description:
Some rubbish is compiling amongst these weeds, so it would be good if they could be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crescent Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
